ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] Practice lettering by creating an Autumn gift for a friend.
[ ] Use your lettering skills to bless someone you know in a nursing care facility.
[ ] Send a card to a missionary to let them know they are not forgotten.

[ ] Do a brush drawing of a dormant tree and letter an appropriate quote around it.
[ ] Create Christmas cards to send to family and friends.
[ ] Create Christmas gift tags.

[ ] Create a spring-themed brush drawing and use your pens to letter the word "SPRING" on it.
[ ] Make a poster announcing the arrival of Spring. Use a favorite quote from your Book of Quotes.
[ ] Complete a miniature brush drawing and letter a Bible verse over it. Frame it and give it to someone in need of encouragement.

resources.title: Creative Lettering and Beyond: Inspiring Tips, Techniques, and Ideas for Hand Lettering Your Way to Beautiful Works of Art
resources.author: Gabri Joy Kirkendall, et al.

resources.title: The Great Big Book of Amazing Creative Lettering
resources.author: hinkler
resources.rationale: Lots of lettering ideas and different fonts.

resources.title: The Ultimate Guide to Modern Calligraphy & Hand Lettering for Beginners
resources.author: June & Lucy
resources.rationale: Ways to use lettering with brush or pen.
